_readme: site/pubmed.mjs が、検索を実行した副作用として追記します。
**手で編集しないこと。エージェントに書かせないこと。**
書かせた瞬間、これは「検索した証拠」ではなく「検索したという主張」になります。
ここに記録されるのは、実際に PubMed に投げた検索語・返ってきた件数・日付だけです。
件数が 0 でも記録します。**むしろ 0 のときこそ、この記録に意味があります。**
この記録は、記事のレシートに「読者がクリックできるリンク」として出ます。
★ 読者は30秒で、うちの検索を自分の画面で再実行できます。
**このブログを信じなくても、答えが手に入る。** それが、この仕組みの目的です。

hyaluronic-acid.query: "hyaluronic acid"[tiab] AND (oral[tiab] OR ingestion[tiab]) AND skin[tiab] AND "randomized controlled trial"[pt]

("hyaluronic acid"[tiab] OR hyaluronan[tiab]) AND (oral[tiab] OR ingest*[tiab] OR dietary[tiab]) AND (dermis[tiab] OR "skin biopsy"[tiab] OR "skin tissue"[tiab] OR "skin concentration"[tiab]) AND humans[mh]

oral-collagen.query: (collagen[tiab] AND (peptide[tiab] OR hydrolysate[tiab])) AND (oral[tiab] OR ingestion[tiab] OR ingested[tiab]) AND ("skin biopsy"[tiab] OR dermis[tiab] OR "skin tissue"[tiab] OR "human skin"[tiab]) AND humans[mh]

skin-fasting.query: (moisturizer[tiab] OR emollient[tiab] OR moisturiser[tiab]) AND (discontinuation[tiab] OR cessation[tiab] OR withdrawal[tiab] OR abstinence[tiab]) AND skin[tiab] AND ("clinical trial"[pt] OR "randomized controlled trial"[pt])

retinol-concentration.query: retinol[tiab] AND (concentration[tiab] OR dose[tiab] OR "dose-response"[tiab]) AND (wrinkle[tiab] OR wrinkles[tiab] OR photoaging[tiab] OR photoageing[tiab]) AND ("randomized controlled trial"[pt] OR "clinical trial"[pt])

(retinol[tiab] OR retinoid[tiab] OR retinoids[tiab]) AND ("vitamin C"[tiab] OR "ascorbic acid"[tiab]) AND (irritation[tiab] OR incompatibility[tiab] OR inactivation[tiab] OR concomitant[tiab] OR simultaneous[tiab]) AND ("randomized controlled trial"[pt] OR "clinical trial"[pt])

vitamin-c-derivatives.query: ("ascorbyl phosphate"[tiab] OR "ascorbyl glucoside"[tiab] OR "ethyl ascorbic acid"[tiab] OR "ascorbyl tetraisopalmitate"[tiab] OR "vitamin C derivative"[tiab] OR "vitamin C derivatives"[tiab]) AND (conversion[tiab] OR hydrolysis[tiab] OR bioconversion[tiab] OR metabolized[tiab] OR enzymatic[tiab]) AND skin[tiab]
("3-O-ethyl ascorbic acid"[tiab] OR "ethyl ascorbic acid"[tiab]) AND (skin[tiab] OR facial[tiab] OR melasma[tiab] OR wrinkle[tiab] OR pigmentation[tiab])

sunscreen-spf.query: sunscreen[tiab] AND ("SPF 50"[tiab] OR "SPF50"[tiab] OR "sun protection factor 50"[tiab]) AND (wrinkle[tiab] OR wrinkles[tiab] OR photoaging[tiab] OR photoageing[tiab] OR "skin aging"[tiab])

("protection grade of UVA"[tiab] OR "persistent pigment darkening"[tiab] OR "UVA protection factor"[tiab]) AND sunscreen[tiab] AND (wrinkle[tiab] OR wrinkles[tiab] OR photoaging[tiab] OR photoageing[tiab] OR "skin aging"[tiab])

bathing-dryness.query: ("three minute"[tiab] OR "3 minutes"[tiab] OR "3-minute"[tiab]) AND (moisturizer*[tiab] OR emollient*[tiab]) AND (bath*[tiab] OR shower*[tiab])

(moisturizer[tiab] OR emollient[tiab] OR "moisturizing cream"[tiab]) AND (timing[tiab] OR "immediately after"[tiab] OR delayed[tiab] OR interval[tiab]) AND (bath[tiab] OR bathing[tiab] OR shower[tiab]) AND skin[tiab]

pdrn-salmon-dna.query: (PDRN[tiab] OR polydeoxyribonucleotide[tiab] OR polynucleotide[tiab] OR "salmon DNA"[tiab]) AND (topical[tiab] OR cream[tiab] OR serum[tiab] OR transdermal[tiab]) AND skin[tiab] AND ("randomized controlled trial"[pt] OR "clinical trial"[pt])

oral supplement AND topical sunscreen AND (compared OR comparison OR versus) AND (erythema OR "sun protection factor")
("Polypodium leucotomos" OR "oral photoprotection" OR "systemic photoprotection") AND (wrinkle OR wrinkles OR photoaging OR photoageing OR "skin cancer") AND ("randomized controlled trial"[pt])
(oral OR systemic OR dietary) AND (photoprotection OR photoprotective) AND ("sun protection factor" OR "SPF equivalent")
